zh.West Raynham, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可韋斯特 雷納姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe II於1217年出生在英國諾福爾可韋斯特 雷納姆時，他的父親Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe I48歲，母親Joan de Beauffou46歲。他於1229年與Isabella FitzHamon of Bosmere在英國英格蘭素福爾可波斯莫結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1249年被列為sheriff of norfolk。他去世於1251年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可韋斯特 雷納姆享年34歲。

zh-hans.West Raynham, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可韋斯特 雷納姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe II于1217年出生在英国諾福爾可韋斯特 雷納姆时，他的父亲Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe I48岁，母亲Joan de Beauffou46岁。他于1229年与Isabella FitzHamon of Bosmere在英国英格兰素福爾可波斯莫结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1249年被列为sheriff of norfolk。他去世于1251年在英国英格兰諾福爾可韋斯特 雷納姆享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe II was born in 1217, in West Raynham, Norfolk, England, his father, Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe I, was 48 and his mother, Joan de Beauffou, was 46. He married Isabella FitzHamon of Bosmere in 1229, in Bosmere, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. In 1249, at the age of 32, his occupation is listed as sheriff of norfolk. He died in 1251, in West Raynham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34.

fr.Rainham,Norfolk,England: Rainham, Haldimand, Haut-Canada, Amérique coloniale britannique
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe II est né en 1217, à West Raynham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe I, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Joan de Beauffou, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Isabella FitzHamon of Bosmere en 1229, à Bosmere, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. En 1249, à l’âge de 32 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of norfolk. Il est décédé en 1251, à West Raynham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe II 1217 in West Raynham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe I 48 und seine Mutter Joan de Beauffou 46. Er hat 1229 in Bosmere, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Isabella FitzHamon of Bosmere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1249, als er 32 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of norfolk aufgeführt. Er starb 1251 im Alter von 34 Jahren in West Raynham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe II è nato il nel 1217 nel West Raynham, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe I, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Beauffou, aveva 46 anni. Lui sposato Isabella FitzHamon of Bosmere nel 1229, nel Bosmere, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1249, all'età di 32 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of norfolk. Morì nel 1251, nel West Raynham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe IIが1217年にイギリスノーフォルクウエスト レインハムで生まれた時，父Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe Iは48歳，母Joan de Beauffouは46歳であった。1229年にイギリスイギリススフォルクボスメアでIsabella FitzHamon of Bosmereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1249年，32歳の時，職業はsheriff of norfolkと記録されている。彼は1251年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクウエスト レインハムで34歳で死去した。

ko.Rainham,Norfolk,England: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 업퍼 캔아다 할디먼드 레이함
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe II(이)가 1217년 영국 노르폴크 웨스트 라이함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe I(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Beauffou(은)는 46세였다. 그는 1229년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 보스머에서 Isabella FitzHamon of Bosmere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1249년, 32세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of norfolk이었다. 그는 1251년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 웨스트 라이함에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe II nasceu em 1217, em West Raynham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe I, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Beauffou, tinha 46 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella FitzHamon of Bosmere em 1229, em Bosmere, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1249, com 32 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of norfolk. Ele faleceu em 1251, em West Raynham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 34 anos.

ru.Rainham,Norfolk,England: реинам, хэлдиманд, уппир канада, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe II родился в 1217 г. в местности вест реинам, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe I было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Beauffou, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella FitzHamon of Bosmere в 1229 г. в местности босмир, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. В 1249 году, в возрасте 32 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of norfolk. Он умер в 1251 г. в местности вест реинам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe II nació en 1217, en West Raynham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe I, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Joan de Beauffou, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Isabella FitzHamon of Bosmere en 1229, en Bosmere, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1249, a la edad de 32 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of norfolk. Murió en 1251, en West Raynham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 34 años.
